rows: Social enterprise; all-women drivers from marginalised communities; >1M safe rides reported.
Sakha case studies and women-only cab articles
Highly rated by Delhi women travelers; all-women drivers from marginalised communities. Trusted for airport transfers.
Government-backed initiative offering safe taxis for women travellers.
Government-backed Kerala initiative. Reliable and safe for solo women across Thiruvananthapuram.
Bengaluru-based only. Airport (KIA via KSTDC), city rides, outstation. Confirmed operational. Note: booking confirmation process can be slow.
Women-only cab service lists (Her Circle, LBB, media)
Tripadvisor 2025: 'Very secure and safe for women in Bengaluru with female driver. Only improvement needed in booking confirmation communication.' — Solo traveler review
⚠️ OPERATIONAL STATUS UNCERTAIN. Founder met Transport Commissioner to discuss 'resuming' operations (2024 Facebook post). May be dormant. CALL BEFORE LISTING: +91-9820221107 or +91-9320845064.
JustDial 3.4/5 (543 ratings) — mixed reviews. Recent operational status unconfirmed. DO NOT list as active until verified by direct call.
Pink City Rickshaw Company (NOT 'Pink Auto Service')
21 electric autos, 45 active women drivers, expanding to 31 by end 2025. Sister orgs in Varanasi (Holy City Rickshaw Co.) and Udaipur (Lake City Rickshaw Co.) launching 2025.
Website: pinkcityrickshawcompany.com | Heritage Tour, Shop & Hop, Culture Gully tours available
Tripadvisor 2025: 'Amazing experience! Such an impressive enterprise by a group of very hard working women.' Multiple 5-star reviews from solo women travelers.
Website: womencabs.com | Google Play app listed but activity unclear
No recent reviews found (2024–2025). Cannot confirm active operations. Verify by direct contact before listing.
Women drivers for women, kids, seniors
Specialises in school runs and regular commutes for women & children.
Website: taxshe.com | Scheduled and subscription rides
Noted in Inc42 2025 article as active player in women-only mobility space alongside Dovely and Sakha.

 LIKELY DORMANT. Website exists but zero recent activity, reviews, or social media posts found. Last press coverage 2013–2015. Founded by 3 men (not women-run). Remove until confirmed active by direct call.
No reviews found from 2024–2025. TripAdvisor thread asks if anyone has used them — no responses. Do not list until operationally confirmed.

Hyderabad only. Very limited coverage: Old City to Mehdiptanam. Operates until 8:30pm only. ~20 riders, ~400 users. WhatsApp + website booking only. Bootstrapped micro-startup. Confirm current routes before recommending.
Website: dovely.org | WhatsApp booking only | Old City–Mehdiptanam route only
V6 Weekend TV feature July 2024 confirms operations. 'Once a woman books, she becomes a regular customer.' — Founder. Limited to one corridor in Hyderabad.
Bengaluru (expanding to Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Hyderabad)
Women-only bike rides with women drivers on Uber app
Launched December 2024 in Bengaluru. Uber confirmed expansion to 5 more major Indian cities. Book via standard Uber app — filter for women-only ride.
Inc42 / Uber India press release Dec 2024
Uber app — filter for women-only bike ride option
Launched Dec 2024 in Bengaluru. Uber stated expansion to Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Hyderabad. Mainstream and instantly bookable.
Women-only 'Pink' bike service with women captains
Announced 2025 — not yet live. Targeting 25,000 women captain jobs in Karnataka. Monitor for launch date before listing as bookable.
Rapido app — Pink service filter (when launched)
Announced by Rapido CEO at Bengaluru event 2025. 'Our goal is 25,000 job opportunities for women by introducing women captains.' — Pavan Guntupalli, Co-founder Rapido
Women and trans women-driven Pink Auto fleet
Launched September 23 2025 in Bengaluru by Namma Sarathi Trust. Fresh initiative — verify contact and booking details directly with the trust.
Contact Namma Sarathi Trust directly | No app yet confirmed
IANS Sep 2025: 'Women and trans women-driven Pink Auto fleet launched at Press Club Bengaluru.' Brand new as of Sep 2025 — verify current booking method.
Women-led e-rickshaw city tours by women drivers
Launched September 2024 in Varanasi. Sister org of Pink City Rickshaw Company. 25 women drivers, 12 e-autos. Funded by Intrepid Foundation. Perfect for solo women visiting Varanasi ghats.
Reasons to be Cheerful 2025: Sister organisation of Pink City Rickshaw Company. 25 women drivers, 12 e-autos. Launched in Varanasi September 2024.
